text: The surgeon uses a vaso-sealing device to secure the meso-appendix, effectively sealing the appendiceal artery and skeletonizing the appendix to the cecum.

The surgeon uses an Echelon 45mm flexible stapler with a blue load to perform an appendectomy through the vaginal orifice following a hysterectomy. The appendix is removed due to adhesions to the right ovarian complex mass, which resulted in an endometrioma.

The surgeon uses a grasper to deliver the appendix through the vaginal orifice. The ileocecal junction is visually inspected for patency and hemostasis, confirming successful robotic appendectomy via the vaginal approach.
